# OpenWrt Developer Documentation for AI LLMs

> **Source:** https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt
> **Source:** https://github.com/openwrt/luci
> **Source:** https://github.com/jow-/ucode
> **Source:** https://openwrt.org/
> **Generated:** 2026-03-04 13:27 UTC

This repository provides modular, LLM-optimized OpenWrt developer documentation.
Use these reference files to establish technical context before generating code.

---

## Complete Topic References (Concatenated)
For deep dives, provide the relevant complete reference file to the LLM.
These files span thousands of lines and contain all related modules.

- [ucode-complete-reference.md](ucode-complete-reference.md): Full ucode language and API docs.
- [luci-jsapi-complete-reference.md](luci-jsapi-complete-reference.md): Full LuCI client-side JavaScript API.
- [openwrt-wiki-complete-reference.md](openwrt-wiki-complete-reference.md): Consolidated developer wiki.
- [openwrt-buildroot-complete-reference.md](openwrt-buildroot-complete-reference.md): Package descriptions and makefile references.
- [openwrt-examples-complete-reference.md](openwrt-examples-complete-reference.md): Curated LuCI app examples built with modern standards.

---

## Modular Indices
For targeted lookups, read the index below to find modular sub-files.
Modular files are located in folders (e.g., `ucode-docs/ucode-module-fs.md`).

### ucode Language and Modules

- [ucode-module-debug.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-debug.md): ucode `debug` module — 18 documented members
- [ucode-module-digest.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-digest.md): ucode `digest` module — 37 documented members
- [ucode-module-fs.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-fs.md): ucode `fs` module — 12 documented members
- [ucode-module-io.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-io.md): ucode `io` module — 21 documented members
- [ucode-module-log.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-log.md): ucode `log` module — 9 documented members
- [ucode-module-math.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-math.md): ucode `math` module — 21 documented members
- [ucode-module-nl80211.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-nl80211.md): ucode `nl80211` module — 13 documented members
- [ucode-module-resolv.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-resolv.md): ucode `resolv` module — 7 documented members
- [ucode-module-rtnl.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-rtnl.md): ucode `rtnl` module — 26 documented members
- [ucode-module-socket.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-socket.md): ucode `socket` module — 7 documented members
- [ucode-module-struct.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-struct.md): ucode `struct` module — 2 documented members
- [ucode-module-ubus.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-ubus.md): ucode `ubus` module — 20 documented members
- [ucode-module-uci.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-uci.md): ucode `uci` module — 8 documented members
- [ucode-module-uloop.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-uloop.md): ucode `uloop` module — 13 documented members
- [ucode-module-zlib.md](/ucode-docs/ucode-module-zlib.md): ucode `zlib` module — 33 documented members

### Curated LuCI Examples
